author: Arjun Krishna
name: ArjunAutoresearch
blurb: SP-1024 9x512 KV4 with seq_len=4096, lower LRs (matrix/scalar 0.02, embed 0.03), Muon momentum 0.99, warmdown 3000 steps, fp16 tied embedding export (MLP_HIDDEN=992 to stay under 16MB), and sliding window evaluation at stride=64 with 4096-token context windows. Each token scored with up to 4032 tokens of context.
